name: table-curves
description: Tables store x-y pairs used for load histories, property curves, boundary-condition modifiers, and exported history data. Shared 9.0 kernel.
syntax_note: Every table subcommand except 'table list' takes a table name first: "table '<name>' add (x,y) ...". Reference a table from 'apply ... table '<name>'' or 'fish' for time/space-varying values.
notes: History results can be written to a table via 'history export ... table '<name>''.
